name: obsidian-file-link
description: A plugin to add better external file links to notes.

scripts.devbuild: rollup --config rollup.config.js --environment BUILD:production && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css $HOME/Mac/GitHub/marcjulianschwarz/obsidian/obsidian-raycast-test/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-file-link/
scripts.release: yarn build && node -e "const v = require('./manifest.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('gh release create ' + v + ' main.js manifest.json styles.css --title ' + v + ' --generate-notes', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
